summary: Cleared example-live-artifact plugin snapshot and updated project linkedDir in Open Design DB
details: The Live Artifact project in ~/open-design/.od/app.sqlite still referenced the example-live-artifact plugin snapshot (ce69ae1c-226c-46a7-908a-d0e1939533d2) and an old linkedDirs path. Removed the project-level applied_plugin_snapshot_id and pointed linkedDirs to /Users/returntoinnocense/sloppyxbaby to eliminate the AGENT_PROMPT_TOO_LARGE error on single-character prompts.
